sources.title: Anthony Hopkins - 1971 - When Eight Bells Toll - The spy mission that sank £8 million in gold!
sources.description:
British agent Philip Calvert (Anthony Hopkins) hunts modern-day pirates hijacking gold ships near the Scottish Isles. With backup from his eccentric boss "Uncle Arthur" (Robert Morley), he uncovers a castle-bound conspiracy where even the locals pack secrets.

Original Title: When Eight Bells Toll (1971) | AKA: Alistair MacLean’s When Eight Bells Toll

⭐️ STARRING
Anthony Hopkins - Philip Calvert
Robert Morley - Sir Arthur Arnford-Jones
Nathalie Delon - Charlotte Skouras
Jack Hawkins - Sir Anthony Skouras
Corin Redgrave - Roy Hunslett
Derek Bond - Lord Charnley

🎬 CREW
Directed by Étienne Périer (Zeppelin)
Written by Alistair MacLean (Where Eagles Dare, The Guns of Navarone)
Musical score by Angela Morley (as Walter Stott)

🎯 WHY WATCH?
⚓️ Dry wit meets damp danger—Hopkins’ Calvert quips while dodging harpoons!
🌊 Cinematic Scottish seascapes—craggy cliffs and misty lochs amp the intrigue.
🕵️ Twisty treasure-hunt thrills—double-crosses galore
🔔 SUBSCRIBE @CultCinemaClassics

Spy Thriller • Adventure • 70s Action • Crime • Mystery • Dark Comedy •

metadata.Plot: In a vein similar to the James Bond movies, British Agent Philip Calvert (Sir Anthony Hopkins) is on a mission to determine the whereabouts of a ship that disappeared near the coast of Scotland.
metadata.Actors: Anthony Hopkins, Jack Hawkins, Robert Morley
